reference.title: Authoring capability matrix
reference.shortdesc: Compare the major authoring capabilities used by editing, validation, publishing, and AI-assisted review workflows.

section.title: Capability summary
section.p: The following table is intentionally dense so table-aware template regions can show useful structured content.

row.entry: Invalid DITA is caught before publish.
Changes are committed, reviewed, and published with history.
Suggestions are generated from DITA-aware context.

section.title: Attribute examples
section.p: Reference topics often include values such as xml:lang, href, and outputclass that template rules may expose as metadata.
